1 | """
2 | Project Timesheets API endpoint.
3 | 
4 | GET /api/projects/{project_id}/timesheets — Get all timesheet entries for a project
5 | with a summary of billable/non-billable/total hours.
6 | """
7 | 
8 | from typing import Annotated, Optional
9 | 
10 | from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
11 | from pydantic import BaseModel
12 | from sqlalchemy import text
13 | from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
14 | 
15 | from app.auth.dependencies import get_current_user
16 | from app.db.dependencies import get_db
17 | 
18 | router = APIRouter()
19 | 
20 | 
21 | # =========================
22 | # Schemas
23 | # =========================
24 | 
25 | 
26 | class TimesheetEntryItem(BaseModel):
27 |     id: str
28 |     userId: str
29 |     userName: str
30 |     taskId: str
31 |     taskTitle: str
32 |     projectId: str
33 |     date: str
34 |     hours: float
35 |     description: str
36 |     billable: bool
37 |     status: str
38 |     approvedBy: Optional[str] = None
39 |     submittedAt: Optional[str] = None
40 |     rejectedReason: Optional[str] = None
41 | 
42 | 
43 | class TimesheetSummary(BaseModel):
44 |     billable: float
45 |     nonBillable: float
46 |     total: float
47 | 
48 | 
49 | class ProjectTimesheetResponse(BaseModel):
50 |     entries: list[TimesheetEntryItem]
51 |     summary: TimesheetSummary
52 | 
53 | 
54 | # =========================
55 | # Endpoint
56 | # =========================
57 | 
58 | 
59 | @router.get(
60 |     "/{project_id}/timesheets",
61 |     response_model=ProjectTimesheetResponse,
62 |     summary="Get project timesheets",
63 |     description="Get all timesheet entries for a project with a summary of hours.",
64 | )
65 | def get_project_timesheets(
66 |     project_id: str,
67 |     current_user: Annotated[dict, Depends(get_current_user)],
68 |     db: Annotated[Session, Depends(get_db)],
69 | ) -> ProjectTimesheetResponse:
70 |     """
71 |     Get timesheet entries for a project.
72 | 
73 |     Access control mirrors the project detail endpoint:
74 |     - agency_owner, ops_admin: any project
75 |     - project_manager: only their managed projects
76 |     - team_member: only projects they belong to
77 |     - client: only their client's projects
78 |     """
79 |     role = current_user["role"]
80 |     user_id = current_user["user_id"]
81 | 
82 |     # =========================
83 |     # Project Exists
84 |     # =========================
85 |     project_row = db.execute(
86 |         text("SELECT id FROM projects WHERE id = :pid"),
87 |         {"pid": project_id},
88 |     ).fetchone()
89 | 
90 |     if not project_row:
91 |         raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Project not found")
92 | 
93 |     # =========================
94 |     # RBAC
95 |     # =========================
96 |     if role not in ("agency_owner", "ops_admin"):
97 |         has_access = False
98 | 
99 |         if role == "project_manager":
100 |             has_access = (
101 |                 db.execute(
102 |                     text(
103 |                         "SELECT 1 FROM projects WHERE id = :pid AND project_manager_id = :uid"
104 |                     ),
105 |                     {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
106 |                 ).fetchone()
107 |                 is not None
108 |             )
109 | 
110 |         elif role == "team_member":
111 |             has_access = (
112 |                 db.execute(
113 |                     text(
114 |                         "SELECT 1 FROM project_team_members WHERE project_id = :pid AND user_id = :uid"
115 |                     ),
116 |                     {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
117 |                 ).fetchone()
118 |                 is not None
119 |             )
120 | 
121 |         elif role == "client":
122 |             has_access = (
123 |                 db.execute(
124 |                     text("""
125 |                     SELECT 1 FROM projects p
126 |                     WHERE p.id = :pid
127 |                     AND p.client_id IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE user_id = :uid)
128 |                 """),
129 |                     {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
130 |                 ).fetchone()
131 |                 is not None
132 |             )
133 | 
134 |         if not has_access:
135 |             raise HTTPException(
136 |                 status_code=403, detail="You don't have access to this project"
137 |             )
138 | 
139 |     # =========================
140 |     # Fetch Timesheet Entries
141 |     # =========================
142 |     rows = db.execute(
143 |         text("""
144 |             SELECT
145 |                 te.id, te.user_id, COALESCE(u.name, 'Unknown') AS user_name,
146 |                 te.task_id, COALESCE(t.title, 'Unknown') AS task_title,
147 |                 te.project_id, te.date, te.hours, te.description,
148 |                 te.billable, te.status, te.approved_by,
149 |                 te.submitted_at, te.rejected_reason
150 |             FROM timesheet_entries te
151 |             LEFT JOIN users u ON te.user_id = u.id
152 |             LEFT JOIN tasks t ON te.task_id = t.id
153 |             WHERE te.project_id = :project_id
154 |             ORDER BY te.date DESC
155 |         """),
156 |         {"project_id": project_id},
157 |     ).fetchall()
158 | 
159 |     entries = [
160 |         TimesheetEntryItem(
161 |             id=r[0],
162 |             userId=r[1],
163 |             userName=r[2],
164 |             taskId=r[3],
165 |             taskTitle=r[4],
166 |             projectId=r[5],
167 |             date=r[6].isoformat() if r[6] else "",
168 |             hours=float(r[7]),
169 |             description=r[8],
170 |             billable=r[9],
171 |             status=r[10],
172 |             approvedBy=r[11],
173 |             submittedAt=r[12].isoformat() if r[12] else None,
174 |             rejectedReason=r[13],
175 |         )
176 |         for r in rows
177 |     ]
178 | 
179 |     # =========================
180 |     # Summary
181 |     # =========================
182 |     summary_row = db.execute(
183 |         text("""
184 |             SELECT
185 |                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN billable = true THEN hours ELSE 0 END), 0) AS billable,
186 |                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN billable = false THEN hours ELSE 0 END), 0) AS non_billable,
187 |                 COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) AS total
188 |             FROM timesheet_entries
189 |             WHERE project_id = :project_id
190 |         """),
191 |         {"project_id": project_id},
192 |     ).fetchone()
193 | 
194 |     summary = TimesheetSummary(
195 |         billable=float(summary_row[0]),
196 |         nonBillable=float(summary_row[1]),
197 |         total=float(summary_row[2]),
198 |     )
199 | 
200 |     return ProjectTimesheetResponse(entries=entries, summary=summary)

<content>"""
Project Expenses API endpoint.

GET /api/projects/{project_id}/expenses — Get all expense records for a project
with a summary of total amount.
"""

from typing import Annotated, Optional

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from sqlalchemy import text
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from app.auth.dependencies import get_current_user
from app.db.dependencies import get_db

router = APIRouter()


# =========================
# Schemas
# =========================


class ExpenseItem(BaseModel):
    id: str
    projectId: str
    title: str
    category: str
    amount: float
    date: str
    recordedBy: str
    recordedByName: str
    status: str
    notes: Optional[str] = None


class ExpenseSummary(BaseModel):
    total: float


class ProjectExpensesResponse(BaseModel):
    expenses: list[ExpenseItem]
    summary: ExpenseSummary


# =========================
# Endpoint
# =========================


@router.get(
    "/{project_id}/expenses",
    response_model=ProjectExpensesResponse,
    summary="Get project expenses",
    description="Get all expense records for a project with a summary total.",
)
def get_project_expenses(
    project_id: str,
    current_user: Annotated[dict, Depends(get_current_user)],
    db: Annotated[Session, Depends(get_db)],
) -> ProjectExpensesResponse:
    """
    Get expenses for a project.

    Access control mirrors the project detail endpoint:
    - agency_owner, ops_admin: any project
    - project_manager: only their managed projects
    - team_member: only projects they belong to
    - client: only their client's projects
    """
    role = current_user["role"]
    user_id = current_user["user_id"]

    # =========================
    # Project Exists
    # =========================
    project_row = db.execute(
        text("SELECT id FROM projects WHERE id = :pid"),
        {"pid": project_id},
    ).fetchone()

    if not project_row:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Project not found")

    # =========================
    # RBAC
    # =========================
    if role not in ("agency_owner", "ops_admin"):
        has_access = False

        if role == "project_manager":
            has_access = (
                db.execute(
                    text(
                        "SELECT 1 FROM projects WHERE id = :pid AND project_manager_id = :uid"
                    ),
                    {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
                ).fetchone()
                is not None
            )

        elif role == "team_member":
            has_access = (
                db.execute(
                    text(
                        "SELECT 1 FROM project_team_members WHERE project_id = :pid AND user_id = :uid"
                    ),
                    {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
                ).fetchone()
                is not None
            )

        elif role == "client":
            has_access = (
                db.execute(
                    text("""
                    SELECT 1 FROM projects p
                    WHERE p.id = :pid
                    AND p.client_id IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE user_id = :uid)
                """),
                    {"pid": project_id, "uid": user_id},
                ).fetchone()
                is not None
            )

        if not has_access:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=403, detail="You don't have access to this project"
            )

    # =========================
    # Fetch Expenses
    # =========================
    rows = db.execute(
        text("""
            SELECT
                e.id, e.project_id, e.title, e.category, e.amount,
                e.date, e.recorded_by, COALESCE(u.name, 'Unknown') AS recorded_by_name,
                e.status, e.notes
            FROM expenses e
            LEFT JOIN users u ON e.recorded_by = u.id
            WHERE e.project_id = :project_id
            ORDER BY e.date DESC
        """),
        {"project_id": project_id},
    ).fetchall()

    expenses = [
        ExpenseItem(
            id=r[0],
            projectId=r[1],
            title=r[2],
            category=r[3],
            amount=float(r[4]),
            date=r[5].isoformat() if r[5] else "",
            recordedBy=r[6],
            recordedByName=r[7],
            status=r[8],
            notes=r[9],
        )
        for r in rows
    ]

    # =========================
    # Summary
    # =========================
    summary_row = db.execute(
        text("""
            SELECT
                COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total
            FROM expenses
            WHERE project_id = :project_id
        """),
        {"project_id": project_id},
    ).fetchone()

    summary = ExpenseSummary(
        total=float(summary_row[0]),
    )

    return ProjectExpensesResponse(expenses=expenses, summary=summary)

<content>"""
Tests for GET /api/projects/{projectId}/expenses.

Tests cover:
- Authentication (401)
- 404 for missing project
- Role-based access control (all 5 roles)
- Response structure: expenses array + summary object
- Summary aggregation correctness (total)
- Expense item field validation
- Seed data verification for specific projects
- All expenses belong to requested project
"""

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

client = TestClient(app)


# =========================
# Helpers
# =========================


def login(email: str, password: str = "123456"):
    res = client.post("/api/auth/login", json={"email": email, "password": password})
    assert res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed for {email}"


def get_project_expenses(project_id: str):
    return client.get(f"/api/projects/{project_id}/expenses")


# =====================================================
# AUTHENTICATION
# =====================================================


class TestAuthentication:
    def test_unauthenticated_returns_401(self):
        client.cookies.clear()
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_001")
        assert response.status_code == 401

    def test_authenticated_owner_returns_200(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_001")
        assert response.status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()


# =====================================================
# 404
# =====================================================


class TestNotFound:
    def test_nonexistent_project_returns_404(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_nonexistent")
        assert response.status_code == 404
        assert response.json()["detail"] == "Project not found"
        client.cookies.clear()


# =====================================================
# ROLE-BASED ACCESS CONTROL
# =====================================================


class TestRoleBasedAccessControl:
    def test_agency_owner_can_access_any_project(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_001").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_002").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_003").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_004").status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_ops_admin_can_access_any_project(self):
        login("ops@agency.com")
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_001").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_004").status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_project_manager_can_access_managed_project(self):
        """pm@agency.com (usr_003) manages prj_001 and prj_003."""
        login("pm@agency.com")
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_001").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_003").status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_project_manager_cannot_access_unmanaged_project(self):
        """pm@agency.com does NOT manage prj_002 or prj_004."""
        login("pm@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_002")
        assert response.status_code == 403
        assert "access" in response.json()["detail"].lower()
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_project_manager2_can_access_own_projects(self):
        """pm2@agency.com (usr_004) manages prj_002 and prj_004."""
        login("pm2@agency.com")
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_002").status_code == 200
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_004").status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_project_manager2_cannot_access_other_projects(self):
        login("pm2@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_001")
        assert response.status_code == 403
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_team_member_can_access_own_project(self):
        """team@agency.com (usr_005) is a member of prj_001."""
        login("team@agency.com")
        assert get_project_expenses("prj_001").status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_team_member_cannot_access_other_project(self):
        """copy@agency.com (usr_007) is NOT a member of prj_004."""
        login("copy@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_004")
        assert response.status_code == 403
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_client_can_access_own_project(self):
        """client@agency.com (usr_009) -> cli_001 -> prj_001."""
        login("client@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_001")
        assert response.status_code == 200
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_client_cannot_access_other_project(self):
        """client@agency.com is NOT linked to prj_002."""
        login("client@agency.com")
        response = get_project_expenses("prj_002")
        assert response.status_code == 403
        client.cookies.clear()


# =====================================================
# RESPONSE STRUCTURE
# =====================================================


class TestResponseStructure:

        login("owner@agency.com")
        data = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()

        assert "summary" in data
        assert isinstance(data["expenses"], list)

    def test_summary_has_total_field(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        summary = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["summary"]
        assert "total" in summary
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_summary_total_is_non_negative_number(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        summary = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["summary"]
        assert isinstance(summary["total"], (int, float))
        assert summary["total"] >= 0

    def test_expense_item_has_required_fields(self):
        login("owner@agency.com")
        expenses = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["expenses"]
        assert len(expenses) > 0, "prj_001 should have expenses in seed data"
        expense = expenses[0]
        for field in (

            "title",
            "category",
            "amount",
            "date",
            "recordedBy",

        login("owner@agency.com")
        expenses = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["expenses"]
        for expense in expenses:

        login("owner@agency.com")
        expenses = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["expenses"]

            assert isinstance(expense["amount"], (int, float))
            assert expense["amount"] > 0
        client.cookies.clear()

        """Status must be one of: submitted, verified, disputed."""
        login("owner@agency.com")
        expenses = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["expenses"]
        valid_statuses = {"submitted", "verified", "disputed"}
        for expense in expenses:
            assert expense["status"] in valid_statuses
        client.cookies.clear()

    def test_expense_category_is_valid_value(self):
        """Category must be one of the valid expense categories."""
        login("owner@agency.com")
        expenses = get_project_expenses("prj_001").json()["expenses"]
        valid_categories = {
            "design", "development", "production", "strategy",
